Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}...Anyway, my friends and I are really into the dessert they serve at the café there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}Oh! Do you wanna come with us after school sometime, Mitsuru-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}I'd like to try this "special strawberry parfait" you mentioned.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}If you have any other recommendations, I'd love to hear them, Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Oh, there's this new place one city over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}If you have any other recommendations, I'd love to hear them, Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Hm... Oh, there's this new place one city over.[n]{f 1 1}
